title: Contact the Access to Information and Privacy Directorate - Canada.ca
content:
## Contact the Access to Information and Privacy Directorate
If you have a general enquiry, contact the Access to Information and Privacy (ATIP) Directorate at:
- 613-960-5393 (Ottawa area)
- 1-866-333-5402 (toll free)
Email: ATIP-AIPRP@cra-arc.gc.ca
Note : To send a formal access to information or privacy request or to find other easier ways to ask for information from the CRA, go to Request information from the Canada Revenue Agency .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
